meaning: vt.检验,校验,查证,核实 [计] 打开或关闭文件的读写校验
examples: An external auditor will verify the accounts.
They now take extra steps to verify the creditworthiness of customers.
Inspectors were sent to visit nuclear sites and verify compliance with the treaty.
Verify which PS Vita card you are using by looking at the home screen's info bar.
It is impossible to verify who precisely is driving the demand for Chinese consumer goods.
